metadata.title: Kling 3.0 - AI Video Generator | Marble AI
metadata.description: Kling 3.0 by Kling AI. Video generation model that creates videos from text and images, supports multi-shot storytelling, and produces native audio with cinematic control up to 15 seconds.

hero.title: Kling 3.0
hero.description: Kling AI's advanced video generation model. Create videos from text and images with multi-shot storytelling and native audio with cinematic control.

introduce.title: About Kling 3.0
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Kling 3.0 is Kling AI's latest video generation model that creates videos from text and images, supports multi-shot storytelling, and produces native audio with cinematic control up to 15 seconds.

items.title: Multi-Shot Storytelling
items.description: Create cohesive narratives across multiple shots with consistent visuals.

items.title: Native Audio
items.description: Generate videos with synchronized speech, ambient sound, and music.

items.title: Cinematic Control
items.description: Advanced camera movements and cinematic shot composition.

items.title: 15-Second Output
items.description: Generate videos up to 15 seconds with professional quality.

features.title: Key Features
features.description: Discover what makes Kling 3.0 a leading AI video generation model.

items.title: Text To Video
items.description: Generate stunning videos from text descriptions with cinematic quality.

items.title: Image To Video
items.description: Transform static images into dynamic video content with natural motion.

items.title: Video To Video
items.description: Edit and transform existing videos with AI-powered enhancement.

items.title: Audio Generation
items.description: Generate synchronized audio including speech and ambient sounds.

items.title: 1080p HD Output
items.description: High-resolution video output up to 1080p with exceptional detail.

items.title: Commercial License
items.description: Full commercial rights for all generated videos.

use-cases.title: Use Cases
use-cases.description: Explore the diverse applications of Kling 3.0.

items.title: Storytelling
items.description: Create multi-shot narratives with cinematic quality.

items.title: Marketing Videos
items.description: Produce engaging marketing content with native audio.

items.title: Social Media
items.description: Generate viral-ready content for TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.

items.title: Product Demos
items.description: Showcase products with professional video presentations.

items.title: Music Videos

items.title: Educational Content
items.description: Produce engaging educational videos with clear visuals.

items.title: What is Kling 3.0?
items.description: Kling 3.0 is Kling AI's video generation model that creates videos from text and images with multi-shot storytelling and native audio.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: Kling 3.0 supports Text To Video (T2V), Image To Video (I2V), and Video To Video (V2V) generation modes.

items.title: Who created Kling 3.0?
items.description: Kling 3.0 is created by Kling AI, a leading AI video generation company.

items.title: What makes it unique?
items.description: Kling 3.0 excels at multi-shot storytelling, native audio generation, and cinematic control up to 15 seconds.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All videos generated with Kling 3.0 through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: How long can the videos be?
items.description: Kling 3.0 can generate videos up to 15 seconds with professional quality and native audio.

cta.title: Ready to Try Kling 3.0?
cta.description: Experience Kling AI's advanced video generation. Create cinematic videos with native audio.
